name: PDF Extraction MCP Server
what_it_does: PDF Extraction MCP server enabling AI agents to extract text and content from PDF files — reading PDF documents, extracting text by page, parsing structured content, and integrating PDF processing into agent-driven document analysis, RAG pipeline, and content extraction workflows.
use_cases: Extracting text from PDF documents for analysis from document analysis agents
Processing PDF reports and papers for summarization from research agents
Building RAG pipelines from PDF knowledge bases from knowledge agents
Extracting tables and structured data from PDF reports from data agents
Processing scanned PDFs with OCR from document digitization agents
Parsing PDF invoices and forms for data extraction from automation agents
not_for: Web content extraction (use web-scout-mcp or puppeteer for HTML)
Word document processing (PDF-specific; use file-management MCP for .docx)
best_when: An agent needs to extract text content from PDF files — for document analysis, RAG ingestion, or automated report processing where PDFs are the source format.
avoid_when: You need to create or edit PDFs, or process Word/Excel files — this is PDF extraction only.

auth.notes: No authentication — local file processing. Access controlled by OS file permissions on PDF files.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free — open source local MCP server
pricing.notes: Free and open source. Uses PyMuPDF or pdfminer for extraction. No external service costs.

performance.rate_limits: Local — limited by PDF size and processing speed; no external limits

known_agent_gotchas: Scanned PDFs (image-based) require OCR — text extraction may fail or require additional setup
Complex PDFs with tables, columns, or special formatting may extract poorly
Large PDFs may produce very long text — implement chunking for LLM processing
Password-protected PDFs require password to be provided
Community MCP from individual contributor — maintenance not guaranteed
PDF library dependency (PyMuPDF, pdfminer) must be installed separately
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local PDF processing. No external data transfer. No credentials needed. Community MCP. PDF files may contain sensitive content — ensure appropriate access controls.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local processing. No network. No secrets. Community MCP. PDFs may contain sensitive content.
